title: I Graduated Into Covid, Lost Money Trading, Got Called a Failure. So I Built a Free Quant App and Put It on Playstore.
author: OrchidProfessional54
selftext:
No marketing. Just the truth.

I graduated with a finance degree right when covid hit. No job, no plan, lost money trading badly, came back home with nothing. Family called me a failure. No team, no funding, just time and a lot of anger.

Watched the same scam repeat itself for years.

 Apps charging for signals with zero real technicals behind them. Pure exploitation. It disgusted me so I built something out of spite.

Started as a personal trading bot. Win rate crossed 80% on normal days so I turned it into a proper app. Built the entire backend from scratch. Quant engine runs SMA, EMA, RSI, Bollinger Bands, MACD and ATR across 5 live timeframes updating every 30 seconds. Not AI. Pure math.

Added global radio, news terminal with 200 plus stories daily in 37 languages, sentiment analysis, 200 plus assets and a trader social community.

Available on Google Playstore. 

Completely free. No paywalls, no subscription, no full screen ads. Just small native ads to keep it running.

I am 24. Still figuring it out. But it is live, it is real and it is free.

comments.author: andrwlmsri
comments.body: Any thoughts on iPhone friendly version?

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
i just finished the ios adjustments needed today.
 Tomorrow I'll be creating the developer account and then publish it on IOS 😊 should be on the app Store in a week. I'll update you when it goes live :)

replies.author: detoxed696
replies.body: I’d love to try it

comments.author: coloursofthewiind
comments.body:
You say its 'Quant engine runs SMA, EMA, RSI, Bollinger Bands, MACD and ATR across 5 live timeframes updating every 30 seconds. Not AI.'   
  
However in your playstore description it's plastered with AI 'AI-POWERED TRADING SIGNALS, LIVE CHARTS & MARKET NEWS IN ONE APP'. Your images is AI made too, it looks to be just another vibe coded app lol

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
You're right well the description for playstore was ai written.AI didn't pay attention to the fact it's not an AI. 

I am hosting it on cloudflare. Tbh AI would get too expensive and insanely inaccurate I wouldn't be able to host it for free with ads. I would have had to charge subscription. 

The backend is made by me as i been learning since a long time. The frontend i admit is made by claude because i am very bad in front-end design. 

This work took a long time man, instead of dismissing someone's hardwork in 5 seconds that took someone months. Why can't you check it out. 

I am even happy to show you my quant backend that's hosted on cloudflare and show you it's literally just maths with 800 combinations of output template. Template as in text. 

The technicals like rsi, bb% they are being fetched from tradingview, yahoo finance.

replies.author: Fit-Secretary2495
replies.body: You already got further than most people - you actually fully built and released your idea and got it out there. People will always have negative things to say but just keep at it.

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
are you god? cuz you commented it exactly when i was feeling so low today man. i went to some bigger communities and got trolled very heavily there. hated and even racist remarks. 

not one of them downloaded the app but everyone went on to say negative things. and then i saw another notification thinking it's another hate but it was this comment. 

I'll never forget your comment for years to come man. May god bless your whole life to perfection.🙏

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
I been thinking of changing images 😂😂😂

I ain't gonna lie. I gotta do some proper designing in canva cuz these ain't it. 

So yeah imma get onto fixing the playstore.

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
i fixed it btw bro 🫠🫠 it now says real time quant signals. thats it. nothing AI powered. only text now that's AI powered for is the news & market radio cuz well...that is ai powered :/ 

but yeah man it's just math with indicators in the end. shouldn't try to make it fancy for traders who know it all :/

comments.author: leadbetterthangold
comments.body: All those smoothing indicators are useless. Sry...

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
If you're saying all those technicals are useless......then honestly idk if you even do trading. Saying they are useless is like saying brakes are useless because they do not make the car go faster.

These indicators (cough. Technicals) are the foundation of quantitative technical analysis used by hedge funds, prop trading firms and institutional desks globally. They are not perfect in isolation but combined across 5 timeframes with volatility filtering and weighted momentum calculations they tell a very clear story.

replies.author: leadbetterthangold
replies.body: It's curve fitting.

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
Curve fitting applies to backtested strategy optimisation. This is a live real time calculation engine. RSI at 32 means RSI at 32 right now. There is no historical fitting happening. The math runs on live data every 30 seconds on cloudflare. 

The fact you replied curve fitting confirms it. thanks.

replies.author: leadbetterthangold
replies.body: Layering a bunch of optimized indicators will not work in the long run. Just trying to give friendly advice.

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body: ok

replies.author: maloik
replies.body:
Where's the web version? I understand it's not ideal, but I'd still check it out. I don't have an android phone and I'm not super keen on using iOS until I've seen this works.

That said... I'm highly skeptical. I've dabbled in trading enough to know that you can't just layer all of these things, slap on the quant label, and say you have an 80% winrate. If this stuff worked, there'd be plenty of tradingview indicators/strategies that pull similar winrates - it's just not a thing.

replies.author: vb_bro
replies.body: Yeah, I would also like to try the web version. Would you mind sharing that?

comments.author: Glittering-Town9260
comments.body: Pls don’t limit your to Google Playstore, a web app is the most general way to get eyes on your work, and yes, USE AI to get it done!

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
i have a mini version of this app available as a webapp. thing is google SEO is insanely rough. many features also couldn't perform well as a webapp. worst part is google adsense doesn't work with flutter webapps as they see that as a blackbox. even with html css and js content helpers n all, adsense still rejected the website saying it's thin cuz they couldn't see the code i had in flutter at all. eveb when i converted 80% of app into JS. it was useless. 

I'm launching this on IOS as i got the code ready yesterday. now gotta publish on appstore and it should be available for iphones n ipads in a week

the website is still up but yeah it does decent only. it's called mcxtrends.

comments.author: Denis_Kurilchik
comments.body: Good on you for actually shipping it. One thing that will help more than it sounds like it should: drop the AI framing if the engine is SMA, EMA, RSI, Bollinger, MACD and ATR. That is a solid indicator stack and nothing to apologise for, but the Playstore copy says AI-powered, and the first technical person who reads that flags it, which costs you the exact credibility you are trying to build. Name what it does plainly. People in this sub trust precise over impressive. The honest version of your story is already good enough to carry it without the buzzword.

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body: it's crazy man i was literally thinking this exact same thing and you commented my thoughts out 💀. i was on the playstore description thinking i should basically call it more like a screener with technicals n indicators across 5 timeframes. instead of fancy words like quant ai

replies.author: OrchidProfessional54
replies.body:
thanks man. i appreciate that solid feedback you confirmed to my doubts very well. honestly i ain't too good with marketing still so i was using buzzwords. but yeah i should just be honest and call it what it is.

i fixed the description and from here on out imna be honest. it'll be visible on playstore in a couple minutes after i just submitted. thanks man i owe you one. 🙏

replies.author: Denis_Kurilchik
replies.body: We can discuss implementation of execution layer from our side. Let’s connect and discuss on potential cooperation.
